title: 3 Not-So-Obvious AI Stocks to Buy in July
excerpt: Everyone already owns NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Alphabet, but the real AI infrastructure buildout is quietly funneling billions into a different layer of the st...
content_html:
Joel South

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 8:00 AM EDT 5 min read

Quick Read

  • Dell's AI server revenue surged 757% to $16 billion as Arista raised its 2026 AI Fabrics target to $3.5 billion, doubling AI sales annually.

  • Salesforce's Agentforce ARR surged over 200% to $3.4 billion while the stock sits down 35% year-to-date, creating a contrarian software entry.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Salesforce didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The AI trade in 2026 has broadened well past mega-cap headliners. NVIDIA, Microsoft and Alphabet remain reflexive answers, but the second wave of infrastructure and software beneficiaries looks most interesting in July. PineBridge's 2026 outlook flags datacenter equipment growth as "essentially locked" as hyperscaler CapEx compounds, and Goldman Sachs frames the AI CapEx boom as the counterweight driving business and investment activity into 2026. That backdrop favors the layer of the stack bought after the GPUs: servers, networking fabric, and enterprise software that monetizes the models.

Three names capture that thesis: One for AI Factory hardware, another for AI data center ethernet and another for agentic enterprise AI. Each delivered a tool-verified data point in the last quarter that justifies the label "AI beneficiary" without needing NVIDIA in the ticker.

Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL)

Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has become the most levered AI hardware pure-play outside chipmakers. In Q1 FY27, reported May 28, 2026, revenue hit $43.84 billion, up 87.5% YoY, and AI-optimized server revenue exploded to $16.13 billion, up 757% YoY. Non-GAAP EPS of $4.86 beat the $2.96 consensus. Management booked $24.40 billion in AI orders in the quarter and raised full-year FY27 revenue guidance to $165.0 to $169.0 billion, with AI server revenue guided to roughly $60 billion for the full year.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Salesforce didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The bull case is clear: Dell captures the enterprise and sovereign AI buildout that hyperscalers cannot serve directly. CEO Jeff Clarke framed it as "exceptionally strong demand for AI-optimized servers" with over 3,000 customers now buying various forms of our Dell AI factories". Shares are up 241.91% year to date through July 13, closing at $427.11, and traded up another 7.05% on July 14 to $457.21. A P/E of 23 against this growth profile remains reasonable if AI server orders compound.

The risk: gross margin compressed to 17.8% from 21.1% YoY as the AI mix crowds out higher-margin traditional server and storage revenue. Shareholders' equity remains negative at $(1.40) billion, and prediction-market sentiment has cooled, with a composite score of 34.36 (bearish) and a -20.05 shift over the past seven days. A nonlinear order pattern means quarters can disappoint even inside a strong trend.

sentences.zh: 风险：由于人工智能组合挤出了利润率较高的传统服务器和存储收入，毛利率从同比 21.1% 压缩至 17.8%。

sentences.zh: 股东权益仍为负值（14 亿美元），预测市场情绪已经降温，综合得分为 34.36（看跌），过去 7 天的变化为 -20.05。

sentences.en: A nonlinear order pattern means quarters can disappoint even inside a strong trend.
sentences.zh: 非线性订单模式意味着即使在强劲趋势中，季度也可能令人失望。

content_html_zh:
乔尔·南

2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一，美国东部时间上午 8:00 阅读 5 分钟

快速阅读

  • 随着 Arista 将 2026 年 AI Fabrics 目标提高到 35 亿美元，使 AI 销售额每年翻一番，戴尔的 AI 服务器收入猛增 757% 至 160 亿美元。
  • Salesforce 的 Agentforce ARR 飙升 200% 以上，达到 34 亿美元，而该股今年迄今下跌了 35%，创造了一个逆势软件入场券。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Salesforce 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

2026 年，人工智能行业的规模已远远超出了大型企业的规模。 NVIDIA、微软和 Alphabet 仍然是反射性的答案，但第二波基础设施和软件受益者在 7 月份看起来最有趣。 PineBridge 的 2026 年展望将数据中心设备的增长标记为“基本上锁定”，因为超大规模资本支出复合，高盛将人工智能资本支出热潮视为推动业务和投资活动进入 2026 年的平衡因素。 这种背景有利于在 GPU 之后购买的堆栈层：服务器、网络结构和通过模型货币化的企业软件。

三个名字体现了这一主题：一个用于人工智能工厂硬件，另一个用于人工智能数据中心以太网，另一个用于代理企业人工智能。 每个公司都在上个季度提供了经过工具验证的数据点，证明了“AI 受益者”标签的合理性，而无需在代码中添加 NVIDIA。

戴尔科技集团（纽约证券交易所股票代码：DELL）

戴尔科技集团（纽约证券交易所股票代码：DELL）已成为最有影响力的人工智能硬件纯业务外部芯片制造商。 据 2026 年 5 月 28 日报道，2027 财年第一季度收入达到 438.4 亿美元，同比增长 87.5%，人工智能优化服务器收入激增至 161.3 亿美元，同比增长 757%。 非 GAAP 每股收益为 4.86 美元，高于预期的 2.96 美元。 管理层在本季度预订了 244 亿美元的 AI 订单，并将 2027 财年全年收入指导上调至 165.0 至 1690 亿美元，全年 AI 服务器收入指导为约 600 亿美元。

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Salesforce 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

看涨的理由很明确：戴尔抓住了超大规模企业无法直接服务的企业和主权人工智能建设。 首席执行官杰夫·克拉克（Jeff Clarke）将其描述为“对人工智能优化服务器的需求异常强劲”，现在有超过 3,000 名客户购买我们各种形式的戴尔人工智能工厂”。 截至 7 月 13 日，该股今年迄今已上涨 241.91%，收于 427.11 美元，7 月 14 日又上涨 7.05%，至 457.21 美元。 如果 AI 服务器订购复利，相对于这一增长概况，23 的市盈率仍然是合理的。

风险：由于人工智能组合挤出了利润率较高的传统服务器和存储收入，毛利率从同比 21.1% 压缩至 17.8%。 股东权益仍为负值（14 亿美元），预测市场情绪已经降温，综合得分为 34.36（看跌），过去 7 天的变化为 -20.05。 非线性订单模式意味着即使在强劲趋势中，季度也可能令人失望。
